'''''Abubaka II''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. It was used by [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Zhir-Khan]].

{{Ship-stub}}
